[textmode.js](../../../index.md) / [TextmodeCamera](../../TextmodeCamera.md) / move

# Method: move()

```ts
move(
   dx, 
   dy, 
   dz): this;
```

Move eye and target together in world space.

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type |
| ------ | ------ |
| `dx` | `number` |
| `dy` | `number` |
| `dz` | `number` |

## Returns

`this`
